necessary.label: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled. They enable core functionality such as security, consent management, and session handling.

cookies.name: gatewaze-consent
cookies.description: Stores your cookie consent choices in the browser. Essential for GDPR compliance.

cookies.name: gw_consent
cookies.description: Mirrors your consent choices so our own servers can enforce them: when analytics consent is withdrawn, no tracking data is processed or forwarded anywhere. Essential for making your choice effective.

cookies.name: __cf_bm
cookies.description: Essential security cookie used by Cloudflare to distinguish between humans and bots.

cookies.name: cf_clearance
cookies.description: Essential security cookie that proves the user passed Cloudflare security challenges.

analytics.label: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use the website. All analytics is collected first-party: your browser only ever talks to this site's own servers, which store the data in our own analytics system and may forward it to our analytics processor. No third-party analytics scripts run in your browser and no third-party analytics cookies are set. Only active with analytics consent.

cookies.name: gw_aid
cookies.description: A random identifier that lets us count returning visitors and connect your activity to your account if you sign in. Set only with analytics consent; never shared with advertisers.

marketing.label: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used for ad conversion tracking. They help measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns. Only set when you consent to marketing cookies.

cookies.name: gw_tracking_session
cookies.description: Tracks ad click sessions for conversion attribution. Only set when marketing consent is given.

functional.label: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalisation, such as remembering your preferences.
